name: yako-print
description: Yako Print - Servidor de impresión para Yako POS

scripts.pkg:win: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-win-x64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-windows.exe
scripts.pkg:mac-arm64: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-macos-arm64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-mac-arm64
scripts.pkg:mac-x64: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-macos-x64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-mac-x64
scripts.pkg:all: npm run build && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-win-x64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-windows.exe && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-macos-arm64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-mac-arm64 && pkg dist/cli.js --target node18-macos-x64 --output ../public/downloads/yako-print-mac-x64
